description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a high-mounted straight wing configuration. The body is primarily white with orange accents along the lower fuselage, wingtips, and tail, and features blue star insignias on the wings and tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a light blue-tinted canopy, positioned forward on the fuselage, and appears to be designed for a single occupant. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The overall design suggests a light utility or trainer aircraft suitable for short-range flights.
description: A small, white and orange single-propeller airplane with a high wing, enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear. Blue star insignias decorate the wings and tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, high wing, and forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Left-front perspective highlighting the orange lower fuselage, wing insignia, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, blue star insignias, and the overall planform of the airplane.
description_view_3: Right-front perspective showing the cockpit canopy, propeller, and tail section with orange and white color scheme.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
